spec.expr:
sum by (method, path) (
  quantile_over_time(0.95,
    {container=~"$service_name"} 
    | json delay="context.delay_num", path="context.path", type="context.type", method="context.method"
    | __error__="" 
    | type = "response"
    | delay != "" 
    | unwrap delay 
    [$__interval]
  )
)

spec.title: Lags at Event Loop and GC
